Call Now

Lilburn's Trusted Auto Repair Shop

Honest repairs, fair prices, and customers treated like family. Serving Metro Atlanta for over a decade.

Call (770) 925-3106 Our Services

What We Do

Full-service auto repair for every make and model.

Body & Collision
Auto Body & Collision Repair

Expert dent repair, paint, and collision work to restore your vehicle to factory condition.

Tires
Tires & Brakes

New and used tires, brake pads, rotors, and alignments to keep you safe on the road.

Diagnostics
Diagnostics & Electrical

Check engine light on? We'll pinpoint the issue fast and fix it right the first time.

Climate
A/C & Heating

Stay comfortable year-round with A/C recharge, heating repair, and climate system service.

Maintenance
Oil Changes & Maintenance

Routine oil changes and scheduled maintenance to keep your vehicle running for years to come.

Emissions
Emissions & Inspections

Fast, reliable Georgia emissions testing and inspections to keep you street legal.

Family-Owned Since 2012

CNC Auto Service opened its doors in Lilburn, GA with one goal: provide Metro Atlanta drivers with honest, quality repairs at a fair price. Over a decade later, that mission hasn't changed.

We're the kind of shop where customers become regulars and regulars become friends.

Learn More About Us

Hours & Location

Mon - Fri: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM

Saturday: 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM

Sunday: Closed

Lilburn, GA 30047
